nasb.text: Now it was in the heart of my father David to build a house for the name of the Lord, the God of Israel.

esv.text: Now it was in the heart of David my father to build a house for the name of the Lord, the God of Israel.

cnv.text: 我父大衛心裡有意要為耶和華以色列的　神的名建殿。

ccb.text: 所罗门又说：“我父大卫曾想为以色列的上帝耶和华建殿，
